ranked_movies.title: The Lobster
ranked_movies.reason: Highly discussed and recommended as a uniquely bizarre, thought-provoking film that blends dystopian satire, dark humor, and a critique of modern relationships, sparking numerous requests for similar movies.

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a profoundly traumatic and impactful viewing experience, often used as a benchmark for films that are emotionally devastating yet artistically meritful.

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Consistently recommended across multiple posts as a mind-blowing and unsettling documentary that forces viewers to confront disturbing realities through a unique and surreal lens.

ranked_movies.title: Hereditary
ranked_movies.reason: Often mentioned as a prime example of modern 'elevated horror' that is both terrifying and thematically rich, serving as a benchmark for the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Three Identical Strangers
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently recommended as a shocking and mind-blowing documentary with an unbelievable true story that challenges perceptions.

ranked_movies.title: Irreversible
ranked_movies.reason: Heavily discussed as an intentionally disturbing and technically brutal film designed to provoke a visceral, nauseating reaction from the audience.

ranked_movies.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
ranked_movies.reason: Directly recommended as the logical next step for fans of 'The Lobster', cited for its similar unsettling tone and impact from the same director.

ranked_movies.title: Happiness
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a chilling, dark comedy that deals with profoundly disturbing themes and leaves a lasting impression.

ranked_movies.title: Mysterious Skin
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as an extremely dark film that shakes viewers to their core, dealing with heavy themes of trauma and abuse.

ranked_movies.title: The Jinx
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a gripping and shocking true crime documentary series with a monumental real-life conclusion.

ranked_movies.title: Logan
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as an unexpectedly masterful superhero film that transcends its genre with brutal action and strong character development.

ranked_movies.title: Galaxy Quest
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned multiple times as a surprisingly fantastic comedy with perfect casting that far exceeded initial expectations.

ranked_movies.title: Good Will Hunting
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a film filled with beautifully written human moments about growth, healing, and relationships.

ranked_movies.title: Lost in Translation
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a poetic film focused on real human connection, awkwardness, and subtle emotional moments.

ranked_movies.title: The Shining
ranked_movies.reason: Analyzed in-depth for its thematic complexity and interpretation as a critique of creative men avoiding responsibility.

ranked_movies.title: Kids
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a brutally realistic and traumatic film about teenage life with an ending that burns into memory.

ranked_movies.title: The Station Agent
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a quiet, character-driven film about human connection and beautifully written small moments.

ranked_movies.title: Dogtooth
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as another disturbing and thought-provoking film from the director of 'The Lobster' that stays with viewers.

ranked_movies.title: Paradise Lost
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a documentary that will profoundly anger and shock viewers with its portrayal of injustice.

ranked_movies.title: The Emperor's New Groove
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as an unexpectedly brilliant Disney film that overcame development hell to become a beloved classic.
